prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 抖音热度排名第96位，评价为「 一般」，短视频曝光量处于中低水平；声誉文件中未见东华大学近年明显负面或正面舆情事件，报考心理层面影响中性；材料科学与工程为A级学科（第五轮评 估），是该校王牌学科；纺织科学与工程为传统优势领域，相关专业（纺织类、材料类、化学类）在招生中具有一定学科吸引力；211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升，2026年约第72名，近年排名稳步提升，体现综合实力增强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度2024年明 显降温，电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐，与该校电子信息类、计算机类招生专业对应；新疆2025年理科考生约5.25万人，2026年全省总考生约23.8万人（含文理），按近 年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。，2025年理科本科一批421分，近年波动不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓和竞争）、以及本省理科考生数量预计大幅增加（加剧竞争）三方面因素，考生规模扩张的竞争压力大于缩招的缓和效 应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约4331名，区间3831–4831名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 5623; in 2024, it dropped to about 6185 (a backward shift of about 562 places); in 2025, it rebounded significantly to about 4437 (a forward shift of about 1748 places). The rankings have fluctuated greatly over the past three years, with 2025 serving as the recent baseline ranking of about 4437. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 49 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and 40 in 2026, a reduction of 3 students (about 7%) compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ranked 96th in Douyin popularity, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure at a medium-low level. No significant negative or positive public opinion incidents involving Donghua University have been observed in recent years in reputation documents, resulting in a neutral impact on application psychology. Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation) and is the university's flagship discipline. Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional advantage area, with related majors (textile, materials, chemistry) having certain disciplinary appeal in admissions. It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has been rising steadily, reaching about 72nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced overall strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science popularity cooled significantly in 2024, while electronics/information/communication and electrical engineering are highly recommended, corresponding to the university's electronics and information, and computer science majors. In 2025, there were approximately 52,500 science examinees in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 238,000 (including arts and sciences). Based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, the estimated number of science examinees in 2026 is about 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition. The 2025 science first batch undergraduate line is 421 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (easing competition), and the expected significant increase in the number of science examinees in the province (intensifying competition), the competitive pressure from the expansion of the examinee pool outweighs the easing effect of enrollment reduction. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4331, with a range of 3831–4831.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology)
- Electronics and Information (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Qian Baojun Elite Class, including Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Physics (Integrated Circuits and New Energy) (Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Mathematics (Intelligent Science Direction) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Materials (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering)
- Functional Materials
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Fashion Design and Engineering
- Chemistry (Light Chemical Engineering, Applied Chemistry)
- Textiles (Intelligent Textiles and Design) (Textile Engineering, Nonwoven Materials and Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (New Energy and Energy Storage Technology Direction) (Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Energy and Environmental Systems Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 4331, with a range of 3831–4831. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (approximately within 4000) can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Electronics and Information, and the Science Experimental Class. Those with rankings in the middle part of the range (around 4300) should consider Tier 2 majors like Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, and Materials as primary choices. Candidates with rankings in the lower part of the range (after about 4600) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Textiles, Chemistry, and Environmental Science as safety options. Fashion Design and Engineering is a traditional specialty of Donghua University and can be considered based on personal interest.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts is approximately 1235 (regular category), which is the only available baseline year data; the university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang for liberal arts is 8 students in 2025, and 5 students in 2026, a reduction of 3 students (about 37.5%) compared to 2025. The reduction is relatively large, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 72nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years and steadily increasing comprehensive strength; Douyin popularity ranking 96th, rated as 'average'; no significant recent public opinion incidents related to Donghua University in reputation documents, with a neutral psychological impact on applications; Materials Science and Engineering (A-grade) is the university's flagship discipline, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Economic Management Pilot Class, Economics and Trade, Journalism and Communication, English) have no direct connection to the advantageous disciplines, limiting disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Economics and Management showed differentiation and wait-and-see attitude; in 2023, Journalism and Communication was clearly discouraged; in 2024, English/Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see; in 2025, Xinjiang liberal arts examinees are about 24,000, and in 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 238,000. Based on the recent liberal arts proportion of about 31.4%, the estimated number of liberal arts examinees in 2026 is about 74,700, a significant increase compared to 2025, intensifying competition. In 2025, the first batch of liberal arts undergraduate admission score is 451 points.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the only baseline ranking of 1235 in 2025, the significant reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (easing competition), and the expected substantial increase in the number of liberal arts examinees in the province (intensifying competition), the competitive pressure from the expansion of examinee numbers is significantly greater than the easing effect of enrollment reduction. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 987, with a range of 809–1165.
